title: iPhone (1st generation)
desc: The original iPhone wallpaper features deep Earth and starry sky themes, symbolizing Apple's ambition to pioneer a new smartphone era. The composition of blue Earth arc and scattered starlight embodies Apple's 'Think Different' design philosophy. This classic wallpaper became a milestone in mobile device aesthetics, remaining one of the most iconic visual symbols in Apple's design history.

title: iPhone 3G
desc: iPhone 3G wallpaper continues the original's cosmic theme, showcasing global connectivity through a more refined Earth perspective. Deep space blue with starlight accent color schemes and layered lighting treatment reflect Apple's mastery of visual depth. This wallpaper symbolizes iPhone's ambition to go global in the 3G era.

title: iPhone 3GS
desc: iPhone 3GS wallpaper presents cosmic themes with more mature color layers. Gradient blue-purple tones and subtle starlight effects create a visual experience that is both mysterious and warm. Apple's design team demonstrates through careful color balance that tech products can also convey human warmth.

title: iPhone 4
desc: iPhone 4 wallpaper features crystal water droplets and dew, perfectly complementing the revolutionary Retina display. Macro photography style showcases natural beauty, with each droplet sparkling with refined luster. As Steve Jobs said: 'Design is not just what it looks like, design is how it works.' This wallpaper became the visual hallmark of the Retina era.

title: iPhone 4S
desc: iPhone 4S wallpaper continues the water droplet theme's refined aesthetics, showcasing the Retina screen's excellent expressiveness with more delicate lighting effects. Crystal-clear water droplets sparkle on dark backgrounds, with every pixel carefully calibrated. This wallpaper embodies Apple's ultimate pursuit of detail.

title: iPhone 4 & iPhone 4s
desc: iPhone 4 and 4S series wallpapers are renowned for their classic water droplet aesthetics, custom-made for Retina displays. Crystal dewdrops and refined lighting showcase Apple's design philosophy of perfectly fusing natural elements with high technology. This wallpaper is praised by the design community as 'a perfect encounter between the microscopic world and digital aesthetics.'

title: iPhone 5
desc: iPhone 5 wallpaper is meticulously designed for the new 4-inch elongated screen, featuring flowing color gradients and elegant lighting effects. The more elongated aspect ratio brings entirely new visual composition, with soft blue-purple tones reflecting Apple's deep understanding of color harmony.

title: iPhone 5C
desc: iPhone 5C wallpaper features bright and lively colors, perfectly echoing the colorful device design. Bold monochrome gradients and fresh visual style reflect Apple's design expression of youthful vitality. Each color's wallpaper is carefully calibrated, showcasing the design philosophy that 'color is personality.'

title: iPhone 5S
desc: iPhone 5S wallpaper features elegant gradient colors, presenting refined visual effects to complement the introduction of Touch ID. Deep tones and soft halos showcase the flagship model's premium positioning. This wallpaper embodies Apple's design aesthetic of 'refined yet understated.'

title: iPhone 6
desc: iPhone 6 wallpaper is crafted for the new 4.7-inch screen, featuring flowing colorful waves to present elegant visual beauty. iOS 8's flat design language perfectly matches the larger display area, with dreamy color gradients becoming this generation iPhone's visual hallmark.

title: iPhone 6 Plus
desc: iPhone 6 Plus wallpaper is optimized for the 5.5-inch large screen, showcasing Apple's understanding of big-screen aesthetics through more stunning visual composition. Flowing colors and elegant gradients present richer layering on the larger canvas. This wallpaper marks iPhone's official entry into the big-screen era.

title: iPhone 6s
desc: iPhone 6s wallpaper features colorful smoke and flowing colors, bringing entirely new visual experiences with 3D Touch functionality. Live wallpapers display vivid animation effects under pressure, reflecting Apple's innovative philosophy of perfectly fusing interaction and aesthetics.

title: iPhone 6s Plus
desc: iPhone 6s Plus wallpaper continues the colorful smoke theme, presenting more stunning visual effects on the large screen. The introduction of Live Photo dynamic wallpapers brings static images to life, reflecting Apple's continued exploration of digital artistic expression.

title: iPhone SE (1st Gen)
desc: First-generation iPhone SE wallpaper features a clean and elegant design language, perfectly adapted for the classic 4-inch screen. Carefully calibrated colors and balanced composition showcase Apple's 'small but refined' design philosophy. This wallpaper embodies the SE series' 'classic return' product positioning.

title: iPhone 7
desc: iPhone 7 wallpaper features deep black and refined lighting effects, presenting ultimate textural aesthetics to complement the jet black device. Gradient dark tones and subtle highlights showcase Apple's deep interpretation of black aesthetics. Praised by design critics as 'a poetic expression of digital darkness.'

title: iPhone 7 Plus
desc: iPhone 7 Plus wallpaper is designed for the dual-camera system era, showcasing big-screen visual tension through richer layering. Deep tones and refined gradient effects perfectly complement Portrait mode's depth of field expression. This wallpaper embodies Apple's tribute to photographic aesthetics.

title: iPhone 8
desc: iPhone 8 wallpaper features flowing colorful ink, with artistic visual expression complementing the glass body's transparent texture. Gradient colors like watercolor washes showcase the fusion of digital art and traditional aesthetics. This wallpaper is considered Apple's perfect interpretation of 'liquid aesthetics.'

title: iPhone 8 Plus
desc: iPhone 8 Plus wallpaper continues the flowing color theme, presenting more stunning artistic effects on the large screen. Ink-like flowing gradients and refined color transitions showcase Apple's deep exploration of organic form aesthetics.

title: iPhone X
desc: iPhone X wallpaper marks a revolutionary transformation in Apple's design language, visual aesthetics custom-made for the full-screen era. Deep dark tones and flowing colorful light bands perfectly adapt to OLED screen display characteristics and the notch area. As Jony Ive stated: 'iPhone X wallpaper is a visual declaration born for the new decade.'

title: iPhone XS
desc: iPhone XS wallpaper features brilliant bubbles and flowing colors, fully showcasing Super Retina screen's excellent expressiveness. Crystal luster and rich color layers symbolize Apple's continued exploration of OLED aesthetics. This wallpaper is called by the design community 'a digital interpretation of liquid glass.'

title: iPhone XS Max
desc: iPhone XS Max wallpaper is optimized for the 6.5-inch super-large screen, showcasing big-screen's unlimited possibilities through stunning visual tension. Flowing colorful bubbles present breathtaking beauty on the larger canvas, embodying Apple's design philosophy of 'big screen, big aesthetics.'

title: iPhone XR
desc: iPhone XR wallpaper features bright and lively monochrome gradients, perfectly echoing the colorful devices. Each color's wallpaper is carefully calibrated to match Liquid Retina screen display characteristics, showcasing Apple's design philosophy that 'color is expression.'

title: iPhone 11
desc: iPhone 11 wallpaper continues XR's colorful aesthetics, showcasing youthful vitality through more mature gradient effects. Soft color transitions and fresh visual style perfectly complement the new color options. This wallpaper reflects Apple's precise grasp of mainstream market aesthetic preferences.

title: iPhone 11 Pro
desc: iPhone 11 Pro wallpaper first introduces dark mode exclusive design, showcasing professional positioning through deep dark tones and refined lighting effects. Elegant deep green with subtle color accents perfectly adapts to Super Retina XDR screen. This wallpaper became the industry benchmark for dark mode design.

title: iPhone 11 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 11 Pro Max wallpaper is custom-made for flagship large screens, showcasing professional-grade visual experience through ultimate dark aesthetics. Deep tones and refined lighting layers present stunning visual effects on the 6.5-inch screen. This wallpaper reflects Apple's deep understanding of high-end user aesthetic needs.

title: iPhone SE (2th Gen)
desc: Second-generation iPhone SE wallpaper features a clean and elegant design language, continuing the classic visual style. Though screen size continues at 4.7 inches, wallpaper design incorporates modern iOS aesthetic elements, embodying Apple's design philosophy of 'classics and modernity coexisting.'

title: iPhone 12 mini
desc: iPhone 12 mini wallpaper is meticulously designed for the 5.4-inch small screen, featuring refined layered ribbons. Soft gradient colors and elegant composition present rich visual layers on the compact screen. This wallpaper embodies Apple's 'small but uncompromising' design attitude.

title: iPhone 12
desc: iPhone 12 wallpaper features layered colorful ribbons, presenting modern aesthetics to complement the new flat-edge design. Flowing colors and refined lighting effects perfectly showcase Super Retina XDR screen's excellent expressiveness. This wallpaper symbolizes a new chapter in iPhone's design language.

title: iPhone 12 Pro
desc: iPhone 12 Pro wallpaper features deep dark tones and refined gradient effects, showcasing professional-grade visual aesthetics. Elegant blue-gold tones and subtle lighting layers perfectly complement Pro model's premium positioning. This wallpaper is called by design critics 'the ultimate expression of digital luxury.'

title: iPhone 12 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 12 Pro Max wallpaper is custom-made for the 6.7-inch super-large screen, showcasing flagship presence through stunning visual tension. Deep tones and refined lighting effects present breathtaking beauty on the larger canvas. This wallpaper embodies Apple's relentless pursuit of ultimate visual experience.

title: iPhone 13 mini
desc: iPhone 13 mini wallpaper features soft gradient colors, continuing the small-screen flagship's refined aesthetics. Warm tones and elegant lighting effects present delicate visual layers on the compact screen. This wallpaper showcases Apple's continued attention to small-screen experience.

title: iPhone 13
desc: iPhone 13 wallpaper features flowing colors and abstract lighting, presenting greater visual space to complement the smaller notch design. Soft gradients and refined layering showcase Apple's careful consideration of everyday aesthetics.

title: iPhone 13 Pro
desc: iPhone 13 Pro wallpaper features deep tones and refined lighting effects, fully leveraging ProMotion high-refresh screen's smooth advantages. Elegant gradients and subtle dynamic effects showcase Apple's pursuit of professional-grade visual experience.

title: iPhone 13 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 13 Pro Max wallpaper is meticulously designed for flagship large screens, showcasing top configuration's charm through ultimate visual aesthetics. Deep tones and refined lighting layers present smooth visual experience with 120Hz ProMotion screen.

title: iPhone SE (3rd Gen)
desc: Third-generation iPhone SE wallpaper continues the classic design language, featuring a clean and elegant visual style. Though maintaining traditional screen design, wallpaper incorporates modern iOS aesthetic elements, embodying Apple's design philosophy that 'classics never go out of style.'

title: iPhone 14
desc: iPhone 14 wallpaper features deep astronomical landscapes, carefully designed to complement the new lock screen customization features. From brilliant nebulae to serene Earth views, each wallpaper is meticulously composed to work with depth effects and widgets. This design showcases Apple's balanced art of 'personalization and aesthetics.'

title: iPhone 14 Plus
desc: iPhone 14 Plus wallpaper is optimized for the 6.7-inch large screen, showcasing astronomical aesthetics' charm through more stunning visual effects. Magnificent cosmic landscapes present amazing detail on the larger canvas, reflecting Apple's deep thinking about big-screen visual experience.

title: iPhone 14 Pro
desc: iPhone 14 Pro wallpaper is custom-designed for Dynamic Island, perfectly complementing Always-On display with deep dark tones. Elegant gradients and refined details maintain aesthetic value even in standby mode. This wallpaper is considered a paradigm of Apple's 'function is aesthetics' philosophy.

title: iPhone 14 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 14 Pro Max wallpaper showcases flagship presence through ultimate visual aesthetics, optimized for Dynamic Island and Always-On display. Deep tones and refined lighting effects present stunning visual experience on the 6.7-inch screen, perfectly balancing functionality and artistry.

title: iPhone 15
desc: iPhone 15 wallpaper features soft gradient colors, presenting more harmonious visual effects to complement the new Dynamic Island design. Warm tones and elegant lighting showcase Apple's careful refinement of everyday aesthetics. This wallpaper embodies Apple's design philosophy of 'making technology more human.'

title: iPhone 15 Plus
desc: iPhone 15 Plus wallpaper is optimized for big-screen experience, showcasing visual tension through richer color layers. Soft gradients and refined details present warm and layered visual effects on the 6.7-inch screen.

title: iPhone 15 Pro
desc: iPhone 15 Pro wallpaper is inspired by titanium metal texture, with deep tones and refined lighting effects perfectly complementing the new material body. Elegant gradients and subtle metallic luster showcase Apple's digital interpretation of material aesthetics. This wallpaper is called by the design community 'a visual declaration of the titanium era.'

title: iPhone 15 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 15 Pro Max wallpaper showcases flagship positioning through ultimate dark aesthetics, with titanium-inspired tones and refined lighting layers creating top-tier visual experience. On the 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR screen, every detail showcases Apple's relentless pursuit of perfection.

title: iPhone 16
desc: iPhone 16 wallpaper welcomes the Apple Intelligence era with entirely new color language, showcasing intelligent aesthetics' charm through soft gradients and dynamic effects. Carefully designed visual layers perfectly complement Camera Control and Action button's new interactions, embodying Apple's design philosophy of 'intelligence and aesthetics coexisting.'

title: iPhone 16 Plus
desc: iPhone 16 Plus wallpaper is optimized for big-screen intelligent experience, showcasing Apple Intelligence's visual charm through richer color expression. Warm gradients and refined lighting effects present the aesthetic style of the intelligent era on the 6.7-inch screen.

title: iPhone 16 Pro
desc: iPhone 16 Pro wallpaper features deep professional-grade tones, perfectly complementing Apple Intelligence and the increased screen size upgrade. Elegant gradients and refined details fully leverage Super Retina XDR screen's excellent expressiveness. This wallpaper showcases Apple's deep understanding of professional user aesthetic needs.

title: iPhone 16 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 16 Pro Max wallpaper showcases top flagship's extraordinary charm through ultimate visual aesthetics, with deep tones and refined lighting layers perfectly complementing the 6.9-inch super-large screen. This wallpaper is praised by design critics as 'the pinnacle of Apple's dark aesthetics,' defining new standards for smartphone wallpapers.

title: iPhone 16e
desc: iPhone 16e wallpaper features fresh and vibrant colors, continuing the SE series' minimalist aesthetic tradition. Bright gradients and elegant composition showcase Apple's uncompromising attitude toward entry-level product aesthetic quality. This wallpaper embodies Apple's brand promise that 'every product deserves beautiful design.'

title: iPhone 17
desc: iPhone 17 wallpaper fuses Apple's latest liquid glass design language, featuring flowing translucent layers and refined light refraction. This wallpaper perfectly showcases the visual innovation of next-generation iOS 26, praised by design critics as 'an entirely new chapter in Apple's decade-long flat design evolution.'

title: iPhone 17 Plus
desc: iPhone 17 Plus wallpaper optimizes liquid glass aesthetics for big-screen experience, showcasing the new design language's charm through more stunning visual effects. Flowing lighting and translucent layering present dreamlike visual experience on the 6.7-inch screen.

title: iPhone 17 Pro
desc: iPhone 17 Pro wallpaper features professional-grade liquid glass aesthetics, with deep tones and refined light refraction effects perfectly complementing ProMotion screen's smooth performance. This wallpaper showcases Apple's forward-looking definition of next-generation professional visual experience.

title: iPhone 17 Pro Max
desc: iPhone 17 Pro Max wallpaper showcases top flagship's extraordinary charm through ultimate liquid glass aesthetics, with flowing translucent layers and refined lighting effects presenting amazing visual depth on the super-large screen. This wallpaper is praised by the design community as 'a milestone defining the next decade of mobile aesthetics.'

title: iPhone Air
desc: iPhone Air wallpaper features a light and ethereal design language, perfectly complementing the revolutionary ultra-thin body design. Subtle colors and flowing visual effects symbolize the Air series' 'light as air' product philosophy. This wallpaper showcases Apple's ultimate interpretation of 'thin aesthetics,' becoming a visual declaration of iPhone product line diversification.
